---
title: ""
format: 
  html:
    echo: false
    self-contained: true
---
```{r}
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(openxlsx)
library(jsonlite)
library(r2d3)
library(quarto)


df17_county <- read.xlsx("../data/raw/NASS/NASSAgcensusDownload2017.xlsx", sheet = "County Names")
df17_farm <- read.xlsx("../data/raw/NASS/NASSAgcensusDownload2017.xlsx", sheet = "Farms")
# Need y17_M001 (Number of Farms) * y17_M003 (Average Size of Farms in Acres)

df17_farm <- df17_farm |> 
  select(FIPSTEXT, y17_M001_valueNumeric, y17_M003_valueNumeric) |> 
  mutate(acres_17 = y17_M001_valueNumeric * y17_M003_valueNumeric) |> 
  select(-y17_M001_valueNumeric, -y17_M003_valueNumeric)

df22_county <- read.xlsx("../data/raw/NASS/NASSAgCensusDownload2022_175maps_Links.xlsx", sheet = "County Names")
df22_farm <- read.xlsx("../data/raw/NASS/NASSAgCensusDownload2022_175maps_Links.xlsx", sheet = "Farms")
# Need y22_M001 (Number of Farms) * y22_M002 (Average Size of Farms in Acres)

df22_farm <- df22_farm |> 
  select(FIPSTEXT, y22_M001_valueNumeric, y22_M002_valueNumeric) |> 
  mutate(acres_22 = y22_M001_valueNumeric * y22_M002_valueNumeric) |> 
  select(-y22_M001_valueNumeric, -y22_M002_valueNumeric)

# check FIPSTEXT are the same
# full_join(df17_county, df22_county, by = "FIPSTEXT") |> 
#   mutate(check = CountyName.x == CountyName.y) |> 
#   count(check)

df <- full_join(df17_farm, df22_farm, by = c("FIPSTEXT")) |> 
  full_join(df22_county, by = "FIPSTEXT") |> 
  drop_na(CountyName) |> 
  rename(county_fips = FIPSTEXT)

df_county <- df |> 
  mutate(change = acres_22 - acres_17,
         perc_baseline = (change) / acres_17 * 100)


df_state <- df |> 
  mutate(  
    state_fips  = substr(county_fips, 1, 2)                          
  ) |> 
  group_by(StateName, state_fips) |> 
  summarise(acres_17 = sum(acres_17, na.rm = TRUE),
            acres_22 = sum(acres_22, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(change = acres_22 - acres_17,
         perc_baseline = (change) / acres_17 * 100)


# unique(df_county$county_fips)
# unique(df_state$StateName)

```

```{r}
ojs_define(
  state_data  = df_state,
  county_data = df_county
)
```

```{ojs}
d3 = require("d3@7")
topojson = require("topojson-client@3")

us = fetch("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/us-atlas@3/counties-albers-10m.json")
     .then(r => r.json())
```

```{ojs}
//transpose needed between R df to ojs
state_rows = transpose(state_data)
county_rows = transpose(county_data)

stateMap = new Map(
  state_rows.map(d => [d.state_fips, d])
)

countyMap = new Map(
  county_rows.map(d => [d.county_fips, d])
)
```

```{ojs}
colorScale = d3.scaleLinear()
  .domain([-10, 0, 10])
  .range(["#d73027", "#ffffff", "#1a9850"])
  .clamp(true)
```

```{ojs}
states = topojson.feature(us, us.objects.states)
counties = topojson.feature(us, us.objects.counties)
path = d3.geoPath()
```

```{ojs}
chart = {
  const width = 960
  const height = 720
  const mapOffset = 60

  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${width} ${height}`)
    .style("width", "100%")
    .style("cursor", "pointer")

// add title and subtitle
    svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", width / 2)
    .attr("y", 35)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .style("font-size", "20px")
    .style("font-weight", "bold")
    .text("Agricultural Land Change, 2017–2022")

  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", width / 2)
    .attr("y", 60)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .style("font-size", "18px")
    .style("fill", "#555")
    .text("% change in total farm acreage — almost all states lost acreage in just 5 years")

    svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", width / 2)
    .attr("y", 80)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .style("font-size", "18px")
    .style("font-weight", "bold")
    .style("fill", "#555")
    .text("Click a state to explore counties")

  // --- Zoom behavior ---
  const zoom = d3.zoom()
    .scaleExtent([1, 8])
    .on("zoom", (event) => {
      mapG.selectAll("g").attr("transform", event.transform)
    })

  svg.call(zoom)
  const mapG = svg.append("g")
    .attr("id", "map-group")
    .attr("transform", `translate(0, ${mapOffset})`)

  // --- State layer ---
  mapG.append("g")
    .attr("id", "state-layer")
    .selectAll("path")
    .data(states.features)
    .join("path")
      .attr("d", path)
      .attr("fill", d => {
        const row = stateMap.get(d.id)
        return row ? colorScale(row.perc_baseline) : "#ccc"
      })
      .attr("stroke", "#333")
      .attr("stroke-width", 0.5)
      .on("click", function(event, d) {
        event.stopPropagation()

        const [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] = path.bounds(d)
        const scale = Math.min(8, 0.7 / Math.max((x1 - x0) / width, (y1 - y0) / height))
        const tx = width / 2 - scale * (x0 + x1) / 2
        const ty = height / 2 - scale * (y0 + y1) / 2

        svg.transition().duration(750).call(
          zoom.transform,
          d3.zoomIdentity.translate(tx, ty).scale(scale)
        )

        mapG.select("#state-layer").selectAll("path")
          .transition().duration(750)
          .attr("fill", s => s.id === d.id ? "none" : "#ddd")
          .attr("stroke", s => s.id === d.id ? "none" : "#fff")

        mapG.select("#state-borders")
          .transition().duration(750)
          .attr("stroke-opacity", 1)

        // Fade title out on zoom
        svg.selectAll("text")
          .transition().duration(750)
          .attr("opacity", 0)

        const stateFips = d.id
        const stateCounties = counties.features
          .filter(c => c.id.slice(0, 2) === stateFips)

        mapG.selectAll(".county-layer").remove()

        mapG.insert("g", "#state-layer")
          .attr("class", "county-layer")
          .selectAll("path")
          .data(stateCounties)
          .join("path")
            .attr("d", path)
            .attr("fill", c => {
              const row = countyMap.get(c.id)
              return row ? colorScale(row.perc_baseline) : "#ccc"
            })
            .attr("stroke", "#333")
            .attr("stroke-width", 0.3)
      })

  // --- State borders ---
  mapG.append("g")
    .attr("id", "state-borders-g")
    .append("path")
      .attr("id", "state-borders")
      .datum(topojson.mesh(us, us.objects.states, (a, b) => a !== b))
      .attr("fill", "none")
      .attr("stroke", "#333")
      .attr("stroke-width", 1)
      .attr("d", path)

  mapG.append("g")
    .attr("id", "nation-outline")
    .append("path")
      .datum(topojson.feature(us, us.objects.nation))
      .attr("fill", "none")
      .attr("stroke", "#333")
      .attr("stroke-width", 1.5)
      .attr("d", path)

  // --- Reset on background click ---
  svg.on("click", function() {
    mapG.selectAll(".county-layer").remove()

    mapG.select("#state-layer").selectAll("path")
      .transition().duration(750)
      .attr("fill", d => {
        const row = stateMap.get(d.id)
        return row ? colorScale(row.perc_baseline) : "#ccc"
      })
      .attr("stroke", "#333")

    mapG.select("#state-borders")
      .transition().duration(750)
      .attr("stroke-opacity", 1)

      // Fade title back in on reset
        svg.selectAll("text")
          .transition().duration(750)
          .attr("opacity", 1)

    svg.transition().duration(750)
      .call(zoom.transform, d3.zoomIdentity)
  })

  return svg.node()
}
```

```{ojs}
legend = {
  const lWidth = 360
  const lHeight = 80

  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", lWidth)
    .attr("height", lHeight)

  const defs = svg.append("defs")
  const grad = defs.append("linearGradient")
    .attr("id", "legend-gradient")
    .attr("x1", "0%").attr("x2", "100%")

  grad.selectAll("stop")
    .data([
      {offset: "0%",   color: "#d73027"},
      {offset: "50%",  color: "#ffffff"},
      {offset: "100%", color: "#1a9850"}
    ])
    .join("stop")
    .attr("offset", d => d.offset)
    .attr("stop-color", d => d.color)

  // Gradient bar
  svg.append("rect")
    .attr("x", 30)
    .attr("y", 30)
    .attr("width", lWidth - 60)
    .attr("height", 16)
    .style("fill", "url(#legend-gradient)")
    .attr("stroke", "#999")
    .attr("stroke-width", 0.5)

  // Tick marks at -10, 0, +10
  const scale = d3.scaleLinear()
    .domain([-10, 10])
    .range([30, lWidth - 30])

  const ticks = [-10, 0, 10]
  ticks.forEach(val => {
    svg.append("line")
      .attr("x1", scale(val)).attr("x2", scale(val))
      .attr("y1", 46).attr("y2", 52)
      .attr("stroke", "#666")
      .attr("stroke-width", 1)

    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", scale(val))
      .attr("y", 64)
      .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
      .style("font-size", "11px")
      .style("fill", "#444")
      .text(val === 0 ? "0%" : val > 0 ? `+${val}%` : `${val}%`)
  })

  // Caption
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", lWidth / 2)
    .attr("y", 20)
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .style("font-size", "15px")
    .style("fill", "#888")
    .text("% change (capped at ±10%)")

  return svg.node()
}
```

```{ojs}
tooltipSetup = {
  // Create tooltip div
  const tooltip = d3.select("body")
    .append("div")
    .attr("class", "map-tooltip")
    .style("position", "absolute")
    .style("background", "rgba(0,0,0,0.75)")
    .style("color", "#fff")
    .style("padding", "6px 10px")
    .style("border-radius", "4px")
    .style("font-size", "13px")
    .style("pointer-events", "none")
    .style("opacity", 0)

  const svg = d3.select(chart)

  // --- State tooltips ---
  svg.select("#state-layer").selectAll("path")
    .on("mouseover", function(event, d) {
      const row = stateMap.get(d.id)
      if (!row) return
      tooltip
        .style("opacity", 1)
        .html(`<strong>${row.StateName}</strong><br>${row.perc_baseline.toFixed(1)}% change`)
    })
    .on("mousemove", function(event) {
      tooltip
        .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
        .style("top",  (event.pageY - 28) + "px")
    })
    .on("mouseout", function() {
      tooltip.style("opacity", 0)
    })

  // --- County tooltips (delegated to svg, catches dynamically added counties) ---
  svg.on("mouseover.tip", function(event) {
    const el = event.target
    if (!el.__data__ || !el.__data__.id) return
    const c = el.__data__
    if (c.id.length !== 5) return
    const row = countyMap.get(c.id)

    // No data — hide tooltip and reset fill to grey
    if (!row || row.perc_baseline == null) {
      tooltip
        .style("opacity", 1)
        .html(`<strong>${row ? row.CountyName + ", " + row.StateName : "Unknown County"}</strong><br>Data Unavailable`)
      return
    }

    tooltip
      .style("opacity", 1)
      .html(`<strong>${row.CountyName}, ${row.StateName}</strong><br>${row.perc_baseline.toFixed(1)}% change`)
  })

  svg.on("mousemove.tip", function(event) {
    tooltip
      .style("left", (event.pageX + 12) + "px")
      .style("top",  (event.pageY - 28) + "px")
  })

  svg.on("mouseout.tip", function(event) {
    if (!event.target.__data__) return
    tooltip.style("opacity", 0)
  })

  return null
}
```

```{=html}
<p style="font-size: 11px; color: #888; margin-top: 4px;">
  Data: USDA National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) Census of Agriculture, 2017 and 2022.<br>
  Note: Total farm acres calculated as number of farms x average size at county level, aggregated for state level.<br>
  Viz: Louis M Penrod | #30DayChartChallenge
</p>
```
